data.title: SEC Warns Tokenization Is Not A Workaround For Securities Compliance
data.description:
The SEC says tokenization does not change a stock or bond’s legal status, warning that blockchain-based versions remain fully subject to US securities laws.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/tokenization-not-workaround-securities-compliance-sec-warns/

data.title: U.S. Senators Question DOJ's Disbanding of Crypto Enforcement Team
data.description:
U. S. senators challenge DOJ decision, alleging conflict of interest in cryptocurrency enforcement team's closure.
source: https://coincu.com/news/senators-challenge-doj-closure-crypto-team/

data.title: Solana Spot ETFs Experience Significant Inflows
data.description:
Solana spot ETFs saw a substantial net inflow of $6.69 million on January 28, Eastern Time. According to Odaily, the Bitwise SOL ETF BSOL led the inflows with $5.01 million in a single day, bringing its historical total net inflow to $690 million. Fidelity SOL ETF FSOL followed with a daily net inflow of $1.11 million, accumulating a historical total net inflow of $152 million.

As of the latest report, the total net asset value of Solana spot ETFs stands at $1.08 billion, with a Solana net asset ratio of 1.52%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $884 million.

data.title: The US Solana spot ETF saw a net inflow of $6.69 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the Solana spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $6.69 million yesterday (January 28th, Eastern Time). The largest net inflow among spot SOL ETFs yesterday (January 28th, Eastern Time) was into the Bitwise SOL ETF (BSOL), with a single-day net inflow of $5.01 million and a historical total net inflow of $690 million. This was followed by the Fidelity SOL ETF (FSOL), with a single-day net inflow of $1.11 million and a historical total net inflow of $152 million. As of press time, the Solana spot ETF has a total net asset value of $1.08 billion, a net asset value ratio of 1.52%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $884 million.

data.title: Ethereum tops $3,000 as crypto rebounds after tariff pause
data.description:
Bitcoin and ether rebounded lastweek after President Trump paused Greenland-related tariffs, lifting crypto prices despite ongoing volatility and heavy liquidations.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/ethereum-tops-3000-as-crypto-rebounds-after-tariff-pause/

data.title: Gold and Bitcoin Show Concurrent Rally
data.description: Crypto KOL Ted posted on X about the simultaneous rally of gold and Bitcoin, noting the intriguing nature of this trend. The concurrent rise in value of these two assets has caught the attention of market observers, as both are often seen as safe-haven investments during times of economic uncertainty. Analysts are examining the factors contributing to this parallel movement, considering the potential implications for investors and the broader financial markets. The rally comes amid ongoing discussions about inflation and economic stability, prompting further analysis of how these assets might perform in the near future.

data.title: U.S. Lawmakers Question DOJ's Cryptocurrency Enforcement Decisions
data.description:
U.S. lawmakers have raised concerns over decisions made by Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche regarding the dissolution of the Department of Justice's National Cryptocurrency Enforcement Team (NCET) and the overall reduction in cryptocurrency enforcement efforts. According to PANews, the inquiry follows the disclosure of a letter sent to Blanche, questioning his actions while holding significant cryptocurrency assets.

The letter highlights potential conflicts of interest, referencing Title 18, Section 208(a) of the United States Code. Blanche reportedly disclosed ownership of cryptocurrencies valued between $158,000 and $470,000, primarily Bitcoin and Ethereum, in January 2025. In April of the same year, he issued a memorandum to reduce DOJ's cryptocurrency enforcement activities, with his assets being disposed of only by late May to early June.

Lawmakers have requested an explanation for Blanche's lack of recusal during the decision-making process and a detailed account of the DOJ's previous claims that the matter was "appropriately flagged, handled, and approved." The letter demands that Blanche provide communication records, ethics review documents, and responses to seven specific questions by February 11, 2026.

The legislators emphasized the importance of enforcing laws against crimes involving cryptocurrencies, asserting that this inquiry fulfills Congress's oversight responsibilities regarding DOJ personnel and policy decisions.

data.title: Hong Kong's First Gold ETF Sees Strong Debut
data.description: Hong Kong's first gold ETF, issued by Hang Seng, debuted with a notable increase in value, trading at 17.41 HKD, marking an 8.81% rise. According to PANews, the Hang Seng Gold ETF holds physical gold, with all bars stored in designated vaults in Hong Kong. The ETF plans to introduce tokenized non-listed fund units, with HSBC serving as the tokenization agent. Initially, Ethereum will be used as the primary blockchain, with potential expansion to other public blockchains offering similar security and distributed ledger technology. Fund unit holders can subscribe or redeem tokenized units through qualified distributors, as these tokenized shares are not available for secondary market trading.

data.title: US senators accuse the deputy attorney general of shutting down the Justice Department’s crypto enforcement team due to his possession of crypto assets.
data.description: On January 28, six U.S. senators, including Mazie K. Hirono, Elizabeth Warren, and Richard Durbin, sent a letter to Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche questioning his decision to disband the Department of Justice's National Cryptocurrency Enforcement Task Force (NCET) in April 2025. The senators pointed out that Blanche held approximately $158,000 to $470,000 worth of cryptocurrency at the time of the decision, potentially constituting a conflict of interest and violating federal laws regarding the influence of personal financial interests on official decisions. The letter stated that shutting down the enforcement task force was considered a "serious mistake" and could facilitate sanctions evasion, drug trafficking, and fraud. The senators cited data indicating that illicit cryptocurrency activity increased by 162% year-over-year in 2025, primarily driven by inflows of funds related to sanctioned entities and money laundering networks. Blanche is currently the subject of a complaint filed by the Department of Justice's Office of the Inspector General.

data.title: Glassnode: Bitcoin's key short-term support level is at $83,400; a recovery in spot and ETF demand is crucial for stabilization.
data.description: In its latest weekly report, Glassnode noted that Bitcoin is still consolidating around several structurally important price levels on multiple chains, with the market in a delicate balance between holder confidence and marginal demand. The report indicates that short-term holder sentiment remains weak, with the lower edge of the current price compression range (-1 standard deviation) at approximately $83,400. This level constitutes key recent support; a break below it could lead to a further retracement to around the true market average of approximately $80,700. Glassnode also stated that overall fund flows have stabilized, ETF selling pressure has eased, and spot market positions have shown initial improvement, particularly in the offshore market, indicating a gradual recovery in buyer interest. Regarding derivatives, financing rates remain neutral, leverage levels are low, and prices are limited by speculative factors. However, position adjustments in the options market remain cautious, with a shift towards bearish skew, increased short-term protection costs, and dealer gamma values ​​falling below zero, suggesting potentially more volatile prices during periods of heightened volatility. The report argues that the key to future price movements lies in whether spot and ETF demand can continue to recover. If funds continue to flow in and are accompanied by stronger spot buying, prices are expected to stabilize and continue to rise. Conversely, if downside hedging demand continues to increase, the market may remain volatile or even face a deeper correction.

data.title: The Bitget 2026 Stock Contract Championship is now officially underway, with a total prize pool of 1.55 million USDT.
data.description: The Bitget 2026 Stock Contract Championship is now officially underway. This year's competition features four core stages: Team League, Individual Profit Ranking Competition, Star Trader Competition, and Challenge Center, with a total prize pool of 1,551,000 USDT. The Team League prize pool alone is 700,000 USDT. Users can choose to captain their own teams or join their preferred teams; the top 30 teams by profit ranking will share this prize pool. Users can register to participate at any time during the competition. In addition, completing tasks such as individual ranking, prediction voting, and trading challenges will earn extra rewards and give users a chance to win limited-edition prizes including stock tokens, high-value vouchers, and physical merchandise. Registration closes on February 11th at 23:59 (UTC+8). For more details, please visit the official Bitget platform.

data.title: Bitmine Increases Ethereum Staking with Significant Addition
data.description: Bitmine (BitMNR) has recently increased its Ethereum staking by adding 147,072 ETH. According to Odaily, this brings the total amount of staked ETH by Bitmine to 2,516,896. This move reflects Bitmine's continued commitment to expanding its presence in the Ethereum network.

data.title: Meta Platforms Surpasses Q4 2025 Earnings Expectations
data.description: Meta Platforms announced its Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing Wall Street forecasts with an EPS of $8.88 and revenue reaching $59.9 billion. According to NS3.AI, the company's stock surged by up to 10% after the announcement, driven by a significant increase in 2026 capital expenditure guidance, projected between $115 billion and $135 billion. CEO Mark Zuckerberg highlighted a substantial AI-driven acceleration planned for 2026, which has led to optimistic analyst sentiment and strong price targets ranging from $800 to $935.

data.title: XRP's Price Decline Amid Rising Millionaire Wallets
data.description: Santiment posted on X that XRP's price has decreased by 4% since the beginning of 2026. Despite this decline, the number of wallets holding significant amounts of XRP, often referred to as 'millionaire' wallets, is on the rise. This trend indicates a growing interest among wealthy investors in accumulating XRP, even as its market value experiences a slight downturn. The increase in these wallets suggests confidence in the long-term potential of XRP among affluent holders.

data.title: Robinhood CEO: Tokenized stocks may be inevitable, potentially reducing trading freezes on traditional exchanges.
data.description: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev stated that tokenized stocks have the potential to alleviate or even avoid the frequent trading freezes seen in traditional exchanges, making their implementation in the US market "almost inevitable." In an article published on the X platform, Tenev recalled the 2021 GameStop and other meme stock trading freezes, noting that they were among the most significant systemic failures in the stock market in recent years, rooted in the then-existing long stock settlement cycles and complex clearing rules. Tenev pointed out that although the US stock settlement cycle has been shortened from two days to one day, settlement can still extend to three to four days on Fridays or during long holidays, and systemic risks remain. He believes that tokenizing stocks and putting them on the blockchain can enable real-time settlement, thereby reducing the risk exposure of clearing houses and brokerages and alleviating market pressure during periods of high volatility. Tenev also emphasized that with the SEC exploring tokenized securities and Congress advancing the CLARITY Act, the current period is a crucial window for promoting the implementation of a regulatory framework for stock tokenization. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitmine pledged an additional approximately 147,000 ETH, bringing the total pledged amount to approximately 2,517,000 ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Bitmine (BitMNR) recently pledged an additional 147,072 ETH, worth approximately $441 million. Following this transaction, its total pledged ETH has increased to 2,516,896, with a corresponding value of approximately $7.45 billion.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a net inflow of $6.95 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, XRP spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $6.95 million yesterday (January 28th, Eastern Time). The XRP spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday (January 28th, Eastern Time) was the Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ), with a single-day net inflow of $3.13 million and a historical total net inflow of $300 million. This was followed by the Grayscale XRP ETF (GXRP), with a single-day net inflow of $2.6 million and a historical total net inflow of $234 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs was $1.39 billion, the XRP net asset ratio was 1.19%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $1.26 billion.
